content:
Hi all, currently MatchGroup is dominating the online dating market, but with time I believe Facebook Dating will slowly take over once they roll out in more countries, until then, if any builders or software developers would like to join a Discord server discussing dating apps and their features. Let me know!
Open discussions around development and updates to Facebook dating, duolicious, government funded apps, and other non-paid apps.
My goal is to change the incentive structure around dating apps… No more gatekeeping key filters and profiting off loneliness.

  submitted by   /u/ChippingCoder
[link]   [comments]
